title: cyperus hirtellus
intro: Cyperus hirtellus, also known as the hairy umbrella sedge, is a type of plant species belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin infections. The health benefits of Cyperus hirtellus include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Cyperus hirtellus is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
